basic_details.job_title: KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Subject Matter Specialist, Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Krishi Vigyan Kendra Parbhani has released the official Subject Matter Specialist & Assistant Recruitment Notification 2026 on the date of publication in Employment News. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced under the KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 20 to 35 years (post-wise) with qualifications such as Master’s Degree in Agricultural Extension or Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized university can apply through offline mode within 30 days from the date of advertisement publication. The official notification PDF and application details are available in the

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 days from the date of publication of advertisement in Employment New

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (Non-refundable). SC/ST and women candidates are exempted.

age_limit.age_details: Subject Matter Specialist: Max 35 years. Assistant: Min 20 years, Max 30 years.
age_limit.details: Subject Matter Specialist: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules. Assistant: Minimum 20 years, Maximum 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Agricultural Extension or Bachelor's degree from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Subject Matter Specialist (Agril Ext): Master's Degree in Agricultural Extension or equivalent qualifications from a recognized University. Assistant: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. Desirable: B.Com / M.Com with working knowledge of Computer and Tally experience of accounting.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 10 for Subject Matter Specialist, Pay Level 6 for Assistant.
salary_details.details: Subject Matter Specialist: Rs.15600-39100+ GP of Rs. 5400/-, Pay as per 7th CPC - Level 10 (Entry Pay of Rs. 56100/-). Assistant: Rs.9300-34800+ GP of Rs.4200/-, Pay as per 7th CPC - Pay Level- 6 (Entry Pay of Rs. 35400/-).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://parbhani.kvk8.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download KVK Parbhani Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KVK Parbhani Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the KVK Parbhani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download KVK Parbhani Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Subject Matter Specialist (Agril Ext): Master's Degree in Agricultural Extension or equivalent qualifications from a recognized University. Assistant: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. Desirable: B.Com / M.Com with working knowledge of Computer and Tally experience of accounting.

rows.fee: Rs. 500/- (Non-refundable). SC/ST and women candidates are exempted.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Subject Matter Specialist: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules. Assistant: Minimum 20 years, Maximum 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Subject Matter Specialist: Rs.15600-39100+ GP of Rs. 5400/-, Pay as per 7th CPC - Level 10 (Entry Pay of Rs. 56100/-). Assistant: Rs.9300-34800+ GP of Rs.4200/-, Pay as per 7th CPC - Pay Level- 6 (Entry Pay of Rs. 35400/-).

rows.event: Last date for receipt of application
rows.date: 30 days from the date of publication of advertisement in Employment News

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://parbhani.kvk8.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What are the total vacancies in KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Subject Matter Specialist (Agril Ext) and Assistant in KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of the application form for KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026 is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for KVK Parbhani posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for Krishi Vigyan Kendra, Parbhani posts is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Subject Matter Specialist in KVK Parbhani?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Subject Matter Specialist post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Assistant post must hold a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. A B.Com/M.Com with computer and Tally experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Subject Matter Specialist at KVK Parbhani?
faq.answer: The salary for a Subject Matter Specialist is as per 7th CPC - Pay Level 10, with an entry pay of Rs. 56100/- (pre-revised Rs.15600-39100+ GP of Rs. 5400/-).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for KVK Parbhani Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a non-refundable processing fee of Rs. 500/- is required. SC/ST and women candidates are exempted from paying this fee.

faq.question: Q8. How can I download the application form for KVK Parbhani?
faq.answer: You can download the application form from the official website of Krishi Vigyan Kendra Parbhani: https://parbhani.kvk8.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for KVK Parbhani Recruitment 2026 includes screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send my completed application form?
faq.answer: Duly signed applications should be addressed to "Chairperson, Jeevan Jyot Charitable Trust, Jintur Road, Parbhani 431401" by post only.
